response.original_title: What should I do if my Kraken account is restricted?
response.overview: Why is my Kraken⭐+1-830-745-0056  account getting restricted? Support available 24 Hours  ++1-830-745-0056  as Kraken accounts are usually restricted to comply with anti-money laundering regulations, secure accounts +⭐+1-830-745-0056  against unusual activity, or +⭐+1-830-745-0056  verify user identity (KYC). Common causes include changing critical ⭐️+1-830-745-0056  account details +⭐+1-830-745-0056  (email/password), using a VPN, failed verification documents, or triggering security alerts on new transactions.
